description: List of daily collections in which almost all the benefactors give one or two dirhams. The lower parts of columns three and four contain accounts of expenditure on communal property in the Great Bazaar, written in Arabic characters. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society 2:490)
tags: communal, gift of money, recipients, Arabic script, charity, poverty
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
